coverLetter:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am writing to express my interest in the [Role] position at [Company]. With over eight years of experience building and scaling web applications, I bring a strong foundation in front-end architecture, cross-functional collaboration, and delivering high-quality software on tight timelines.

In my current role at Acme Corp, I led a team of four engineers to redesign the customer dashboard, improving page load performance by 40% and increasing user engagement. Previously at Widgets Inc., I built the real-time notification system that now serves two million daily active users.

I would welcome the opportunity to discuss how my background aligns with your team's goals.

Jane Doe
summary:
8+ years of experience building performant, accessible web applications. Skilled in leading small teams, owning features end-to-end, and collaborating across product, design, and backend.

- Core: TypeScript, React, Next.js, Node.js, HTML, CSS
- Testing: Jest, Playwright, React Testing Library
- Tooling: Git, Docker, CI/CD, Vite, Turborepo

bullets: Led a four-person team to redesign the customer-facing dashboard, reducing average page load time by 40% through code-splitting and caching improvements.
Architected a component library adopted by three product teams, cutting UI development time across the organisation.
Introduced end-to-end testing with Playwright, bringing release-blocking bug rate down by 60%.
Graduated magna cum laude. Coursework in algorithms, distributed systems, and human-computer interaction.
Earned the Associate-level certification covering compute, storage, networking, and security best practices on AWS.
